title: Habenaria dilatata
taxonomy: Habenaria dilatata is a species of orchid in the genus Habenaria. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Habenaria is a part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Habenaria dilatata is classified under the tribe Orchideae. This orchid species is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
uses: Habenaria dilatata has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. In some cultures, the plant is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its extracts are also thought to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it useful for wound healing. Further research is necessary to fully understand the medicinal benefits and potential uses of Habenaria dilatata.

preparations: Habenaria dilatata, also known as the large-flowered spider orchid, is a plant used in traditional herbal medicine.
